description_long: This is a large, military-style cargo truck with a khaki green exterior and a covered rear compartment. The truck features a robust front grille, two side mirrors, and a cab with two windows. It has six large, rugged tires arranged on three axles, providing stability and off-road capability. The rear section is boxy and covered with a canvas-like material, suitable for transporting goods or personnel. The truck's design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on functionality. The overall appearance suggests durability and suitability for heavy-duty urban or off-road use.
description: A khaki green, six-wheeled cargo truck with a covered rear compartment and a utilitarian, military-inspired design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the grille, headlights, and two front windows of the cab.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the length of the covered cargo area and the three axles with six wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the covered cargo compartment and rear lights.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the covered cargo area and wheel arrangement.
